title: La empresa estará obligada a vigilar con exámenes la salud mental del trabajador
summary: Yolanda Díaz anuncia que el Gobierno dará luz verde al anteproyecto, paso previo para que la norma llegue al Congreso. La reforma no cuenta con el apoyo de la patronal. Leer

title: España ganará un 40% de milmillonarios hasta 2031
summary: Casi 715.000 personas en todo el mundo tienen una riqueza individual de al menos 30 millones de dólares y, de ellos, más de 3.000 superan los mil millones. La cifra crece año a año, sobre todo en Estados Unidos, gracias al impulso de la tecnología y la inteligencia artificial. Leer

title: El Supremo sopesa la devolución de miles de euros de IRPF a padres divorciados
summary: El Alto Tribunal se pronunciará sobre la doctrina de Hacienda que impide a los progenitores con custodia compartida simultanear las rebajas fiscales del mínimo por descendiente y las anualidad por alimentos. Leer

title: Los líderes de la UE piden abrir el proceso de adhesión de Ucrania
summary: El fin de los vetos de Hungría tras la salida de Orbán lleva al bloque comunitario a presentar planes que hasta la fecha se encontraban bloqueados al requerir unanimidad. Leer

title: Explained: New rules on pet passports for trips between Spain and the UK
summary: The EU has tightened up the post-Brexit rules on access to the European Pet Passport. Here's what that means for trips between Spain and the UK for dogs, cats and ferrets.

title: When is it ok to go to the ER in Spain and when is it not?
summary: Spaniards often go to ‘urgencias’ (the ER) even when it’s not a serious medical emergency. So when is it really acceptable to turn up at A&E and when do you need to book an appointment first?

title: Spain's job-hungry youngsters turn to vocational training
summary: With almost a quarter of under-25s in Spain out of work, many are now turning their backs on traditional university degrees and opting instead for technical training that can withstand the threat of artificial intelligence on white collar work.

title: A guide to shopping at your local fruit and veg store in Spain
summary: One of the best ways to integrate into life in Spain is to buy your fruit and veg at your local greengrocer in Spain, called a 'frutería'. Follow our tips on how to shop at them.

title: 'More and more' Americans in Europe look to renounce passports after fee cut
summary: Since mid-April Americans can benefit from a hugely reduced fee to renounce their US citizenship and many are now opting to take that route, campaigners say.

title: Eight fascinating facts about Spain's Aragón region
summary: To celebrate Aragón Day (April 23rd), we’ve delved into its history and geography to offer you some intriguing facts about this overlooked region of Spain, from its unique language to its connection to chocolate.

title: Ten books that tell you everything you need to know about Spain
summary: To mark World Book Day, we give you a breakdown of ten fiction and non-fiction ‘libros’ that will help you get to grips with Spain’s history, culture, the Spanish mindset and more.
